name: marshal
description: >- Meta-orchestrator that takes any direction — broad, specific, or vague — and autonomously chains skills and context into actionable work. Gathers context from codebase, docs, and memory. Only asks the user when it genuinely cannot proceed. Single-session orchestrator.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个能自动把模糊需求拆解成可执行任务的智能调度器。它会自动结合代码和文档等上下文干活，只在卡壳时才找你确认，适合需要让AI高度自主、尽量少打扰人的场景。
